//: Tactical-arena combatant templates. Stats are authored DIRECTLY here, not derived from attributes — combat is decoupled from progression (combat-framework.md). Side-agnostic; data/arenas.json decides which side a template fights on. 'ai' is used only on the enemy side. apStart/apCap/apGainPerTurn are optional; omit to inherit tuning.arena.ap.

combatants.name: Warden
combatants.desc: A bulwark in plate — slow, hard to move, hard to fell.

combatants.name: Stalker
combatants.desc: Quick blades and quicker feet; little armor to spare.

combatants.name: Kindler
combatants.desc: Calls fire from the backline; fragile up close.

combatants.name: Husk Brute
combatants.desc: A heavy, lurching husk that wades into the front.

combatants.name: Mute Wisp
combatants.desc: A darting mote of hush — fast, flimsy, relentless.

combatants.name: Shade Archer
combatants.desc: Looses bolts of stillness from the enemy backline.
